info.title: Gapi
info.description: REST API for the Orbit frontend

post.summary: Log in with username and password

get.summary: Log out and revoke session token

put.summary: Update user (admin role update or self-update)

get.summary: Generate TOTP secret for MFA setup

post.summary: Complete MFA login with a TOTP code
Confirm and save a TOTP secret

get.summary: List all entity configs for the current user

put.summary: Set access policy for an entity config
Set unique constraints for an entity config
Set access policy for an entity

get.summary: Get a list with entities (public or owned)

put.summary: Update the filter for a list config
Update the sort for a list config
Update the themes for a list config
Set access policy for a list config

post.summary: Create a property config (standard or calculated)

put.summary: Update a property config (standard or calculated)

get.summary: Get all settings for the current user and system
Get tag suggestions for an entity description

post.summary: Perform a bulk operation on entities

get.summary: Search for access policy parties (users or groups)
Get medals awarded to the current user

delete.summary: Nuke data by operation type (requires ENABLE_NUKE=1)
Invalidate all fact cache entries for the current user
Invalidate a specific fact cache entry

get.summary: Get current weather for all configured locations
Trigger AI list config suggestions (system only)

post.summary: Proxy an entity to the AI assist service
Create AI-suggested entities for a date (system only)

get.summary: Accept a suggested entity via one-time token
Generate Google OAuth URL for account linking
OAuth callback — saves Google account and redirects
Get Google Calendar events for the linked account
